# completionHandler

**Instance Property**

The handler to call when the user is done composing a post.

## Declaration

```swift
var completionHandler: SLComposeViewControllerCompletionHandler! { get set }
```

## Discussion

The handler has a single parameter that indicates whether the user finished or cancelled composing the post. This block is not guaranteed to be called on any particular thread. Do not dismiss the [doc://com.apple.social/documentation/Social/SLComposeViewController] in your completion handler—the system will do so automatically.

## Processing the Results

- **SLComposeViewControllerCompletionHandler**: Defines a handler to call when the user finishes composing a post.
- **SLComposeViewControllerResult**: Possible values for the `result` parameter of the [doc://com.apple.social/documentation/Social/SLComposeViewController/completionHandler] property.
